source_pr.title: ddltest: refactor logutil.InitLogger in ddltest to avoid data race
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

remove logutil.InitLogger to ```main_test``` for avoiding data race.

```logutil.InitLogger``` will change ```grpclogger``` in global.

```
 WARNING: DATA RACE
Write at 0x0000078adb70 by goroutine 46:
  google.golang.org/grpc/grpclog.SetLoggerV2()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/grpclog/loggerv2.go:70 +0x224
  github.com/grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-middleware/logging/zap.ReplaceGrpcLoggerV2WithVerbosity()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/github.com/grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-middleware@v1.1.0/logging/zap/grpclogger.go:60 +0x1f6
  github.com/grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-middleware/logging/zap.ReplaceGrpcLoggerV2()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/github.com/grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-middleware@v1.1.0/logging/zap/grpclogger.go:51 +0x2d6
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/logutil.initGRPCLogger()
      /go/tidb/util/logutil/log.go:141 +0x2cf
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/logutil.InitLogger()
      /go/tidb/util/logutil/log.go:114 +0x14b
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/cmd/ddltest.createDDLSuite()
      /go/tidb/cmd/ddltest/ddl_serial_test.go:96 +0x136
  github.com/pingcap/tidb/cmd/ddltest.TestIndex()
      /go/tidb/cmd/ddltest/index_serial_test.go:135 +0x4a
  testing.tRunner()
      /usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1259 +0x22f
  testing.(*T).Run·dwrap·21()
      /usr/local/go/src/testing/testing.go:1306 +0x47
Previous read at 0x0000078adb70 by goroutine 37:
  google.golang.org/grpc/internal/grpclog.InfoDepth()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/internal/grpclog/grpclog.go:33 +0x93
  google.golang.org/grpc/internal/channelz.Infof()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/internal/channelz/logging.go:48 +0x164
  google.golang.org/grpc.(*connectivityStateManager).updateState()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/clientconn.go:417 +0x184
  google.golang.org/grpc.(*ccBalancerWrapper).UpdateState()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/balancer_conn_wrappers.go:203 +0x17a
  google.golang.org/grpc.(*pickfirstBalancer).UpdateSubConnState()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/pickfirst.go:138 +0x644
  google.golang.org/grpc.(*ccBalancerWrapper).watcher()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/balancer_conn_wrappers.go:78 +0x2d2
  google.golang.org/grpc.newCCBalancerWrapper·dwrap·6()
      /home/prow/go/pkg/mod/google.golang.org/grpc@v1.29.1/balancer_conn_wrappers.go:60 +0x39 
```
